fusaka_blob_devnet_0.highlight: Engine API serialization bottleneck identified; SSZ transport proposal under review
SSZ can be implemented optionally via content-type header routing

glamsterdam_bal_devnet_2.highlight: BAL DevNet2 running with prefetch/optimization benchmarking nodes added
Aragon switching focus to DevNet3; Besu tracing issue under investigation

glamsterdam_bal_devnet_3.highlight: EIP-8037 cross-client bug hunt ongoing; multiple consensus issues found
Besu: 7 failing tests, 2 false positives; fixes in progress
Marius: EIP-8037 implementation deeply complex; AI-generated code causing issues
Ben/Nethermind: 8037 implementation has tendrils affecting everything; disliked from complexity standpoint
Nethermind/Reth: parallel I/O not showing major benefits yet

epbs_devnet_0.highlight: ePBS forces EL to trigger block production on older heads; spec currently forbids
Marius confirms horrible UX but accepts reorgs will happen; can prepare branch
Marius pushed fix allowing reorging to parents on epbs-devnet-0 branch
PTC lookahead issue: attestations valid in epoch N invalid in N+1
Proposed fix: cache 256KB of PTC committees in beacon state
Decision on PTC fix needed this week before testing attestations

testing_infrastructure.highlight: Execution specs v5.3.0 released: expanded EIP-8037 coverage plus all Osaka tests
Perf DevNet3: 50GB ERC20 complete, EOA bloating in progress
Geth synced on perf-devnet-3; Reth/Nethermind/Besu sync issues being resolved
5 Gigagas testing revealing out-of-memory issues in some clients

networking_proposals.highlight: snap/2 draft: BAL-based state healing using block access lists
eth/71 response size cap clarified: 2MB soft cap, not 10MB

organizational.highlight: ACDT cadence discussion: proposal to rotate topics or convert to breakouts
Proposal: Reserve ACDT slot for focused technical breakouts on-demand

action_items.action: Make decision on PTC committee caching approach this week
Test withdrawals, deposits, blobs on ePBS DevNet0 locally before live testing

decisions.decision: SSZ engine API will be optional via content-type headers; deferred to ACD for final approval
EL must support building on older heads for ePBS; spec will be updated
ACDT cadence will be evaluated weekly; cede to breakouts when no cross-cutting topics

targets.target: BAL DevNet3 launch: targeting March 11, pending client readiness
